Actual footage from a Mason Jar Films wedding. Same frame, two resolutions. Drag to compare.

TV screens have gone through massive upgrades since we filmed your wedding. Your footage is the same. Your story is the same. But there's now a gap between how good your film is and how good it looks. A 4K upgrade puts them back in sync.

A 4K upgrade is a single professional pass over your original wedding film. Nothing re-edited, nothing changed about the music or the moments. Just a new master that looks the way your memories feel.

You'll notice how it feels different the first time you press play. The image is sharper, yes. But what you'll actually feel is more connection. Connection to that day, to the people, to everything you were feeling in that room when it all happened.

What's included

  • True 4K master of your wedding film
  • A new download link. Once downloaded, plays on your phone, tablet, computer, or home theater system
  • Your original HD file preserved and untouched
  • Delivered eight weeks from purchase
